item.title: A Fistful of Dollars
item.description:
2026-05-24 · 7:00 PM

📍 Nevada Theatre, Nevada City

5/24 - Considered some of the greatest Westerns of all time, Sergio Leone’s A Man with No Name trilogy forever popularized the spaghetti Western genre, proved highly influential to everything that came after, and launched Clint Eastwood to stardom. The Onyx Downtown at the Nevada Theatre is proud to present all three films in the acclaimed trilogy, restored in beautiful 4K! San Miguel is a one ...

item.title: Sawing Basics: Pendant Workshop
item.description:
2026-05-24 · 12:00pm

📍 Wolf Craft Collective, Nevada City

The jeweler’s saw is one of the most essential tools in metalsmithing—and once you know how to use it, everything opens up. In this class, you’ll learn how to confidently handle a jeweler’s saw from the ground up: how to properly load and tension a blade, choose the right blade size, and cut with control and precision. We’ll cover straight cuts, curves, and interior cuts (piercing), along with ...

Source: Wolf Craft Collective

item.title: African Drum and Dance of Nevada County
item.description:
2026-05-26 · 4:00 PM

📍 Miners Foundry Cultural Center, Nevada City

Come join our vibrant African Drum and Dance classes! Open to all ages and abilities, we explore different styles from across the African Diasporic disciplines. Including Malian, Congolese, Guinean, Senegalese, Afro-Cuban and Afro-Brazilian. Masters of their craft travel from all over to share their culture and heritage with our beautiful community, along with our own fabulous local teachers an...

item.title: Art in Public Spaces | Lavender Glow, Queer Art & Our Shared History
item.description:
2026-05-26

📍 Eric Rood Center 950 Maidu Ave, Nevada City 95959, Nevada City

Beginning with Nisenan history into the present day, Lavender Glow reflects upon and celebrates the lived experiences and legacies of queer individuals and groups whose collective influence demonstrate a profound investment in place, arts, and culture. Alongside highlights of local history, Lavender Glow features 44 artworks selected from 127 submissions.

Source: NCAC Calendar

item.description:
2026-05-27 · 6:00pm

📍 Wolf Craft Collective, Nevada City

Turn clay into solid metal in this hands-on introduction to bronze metal clay. In this workshop, you’ll learn how to mix and prepare the clay from raw materials, then shape, carve, and refine it into a small object of your choosing. Rings and pendants are popular starting points, but you’re welcome to explore other ideas within scale. The material is incredibly versatile and lends itself to org...

item.description:

📍 13024 Bitney Springs Rd Bldg 9, Nevada City, CA 95959, Nevada City

Explore the art of painting in this fun and immersive four-session workshop! Using a simple and effective four-step approach, you’ll learn how to bring any subject to life—whether it’s a portrait, a wildflower-filled landscape, or a captivating still life. Over four weeks, you’ll gain a broader understanding of composition, color, value, and texture, ending the series with a completed painting ...

item.title: Art in Public Spaces | Lavender Glow, Queer Art & Our Shared History
item.description:
2026-06-01

📍 Eric Rood Center 950 Maidu Ave, Nevada City 95959, Nevada City

Beginning with Nisenan history into the present day, Lavender Glow reflects upon and celebrates the lived experiences and legacies of queer individuals and groups whose collective influence demonstrate a profound investment in place, arts, and culture. Alongside highlights of local history, Lavender Glow features 44 artworks selected from 127 submissions.

Source: NCAC Calendar

item.description:
2026-06-03 · 4:30 PM

Continue your Glassblowing adventures in this 4-hour workshop.  Blowing a cup will be the main focus of this class.  Students will each practice making blown glass with magnificent colored accents of their own design.  You will also learn basic teamwork skills necessary to move forward to the next level glassblowing classes.

item.description:
2026-06-03

📍 Eric Rood Center 950 Maidu Ave, Nevada City 95959, Nevada City

Beginning with Nisenan history into the present day, Lavender Glow reflects upon and celebrates the lived experiences and legacies of queer individuals and groups whose collective influence demonstrate a profound investment in place, arts, and culture. item.title: SOUL Brass Band w/ DJ Fossil
item.description:
2026-06-11 · 9:30 PM

📍 Crazy Horse Saloon, Nevada City

$15 · Soul Brass Band is the genre-bending creation of New Orleans percussionist and frontman Derrick “Smoker” Freeman , joined by an all-star cast of New Orleans heavyweights. Their sound is a fearless fusion of hip hop, jazz, second line tradition, classic soul, and street-born swagger — modern, infectious, and undeniably alive. item.title: Cabochon Workshop
item.description:
2026-06-12 · 1:00pm

📍 Wolf Craft Collective, Nevada City

A cabochon, pronounced cab-uh-shon, is defined as a gemstone that has been shaped and polished rather than faceted . The term comes from the French word “caboche,” which means head or noggin. Cabochon gemstones generally have a smooth, domed top surface and a flat base. Learn how to cut, shape and polish your own cabochons with us! We will demonstrate and guide you through the entire process of...

Source: Wolf Craft Collective

Alongside highlights of local history, Lavender Glow features 44 artworks selected from 127 submissions.

📍 Downtown Grass Valley, Grass Valley

St. Piran's Day Pasty Toss is a fun, family-friendly tradition we have here in Grass Valley honoring our Cornish connection. Join us in downtown Grass Valley on the Mill Street Plaza and watch as Grass Valley's civil servants challenge Nevada City's for a friendly Pasty Tossing competition and so much more! item.description:

📍 Mill Street, Grass Valley

Celebrate 250 Years of Independence — Dancing in the Streets! Get ready, Grass Valley — this year we’re turning up the red, white, and blue for a once-in-a-generation celebration! We'll spend our time focusing on our writing, but with that magical element of doing so within the presence of others. Come discover the amazing experience of writing within the context of a group.
